output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?track wdt:P2093 wd:Q2517468 ; wdt:P1476 ?title .
  FILTER(LANG(?title) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(STRLEN(?title))
LIMIT 1
